detail: Added pipeline/select_cases.py: stratified post-hoc case selection across (correct_verdict x corruption_tier x domain x ml_task_type). Round-robin within strata, ranks by proxy_mean ascending (harder first). Patched orchestrator.py: mechanism_id now embedded in _pipeline; assemble_batch() joins stage5 smoke files to embed proxy_mean + smoke_scores into assembled cases JSON. Current 100-case batch will not have embedded proxy_mean; selector warns and defaults to equal difficulty.

Overhauled stage3_corruption_node.md to produce harder, less detectable flaws. Root cause: 71% of critique cases had proxy=1.0 (Sonnet caught flaws immediately). Problems: (1) anti-pattern names visible in corrupted text; (2) internal contradictions between sections; (3) retrospective phrasing. Changes: added Detection Bar, strengthened justification requirement, added internal consistency check, added prospective voice requirement, rewrote all taxonomy examples to show embedded (hard) versions, added self-check step.
